anchor_context: Scheduled after the 2026-07-05 public commitment block reaches its 2026-08-04 resolution date; actual freeze still requires review.

next_round_template.target_universe_policy: reviewed public geographies eligible at freeze time, fixed for every model in the round
next_round_template.event_definition: first public-authority lab-confirmed detected BDBV case in target geography during the inclusive 30-day window
next_round_template.negative_policy: unscoreable when evidence is absent, malformed, or surveillance-dark rather than confirmed negative
